summary: Both reviewers approved overall approach. Real findings: HIGH (Gemini): .gitignore enforcement must hard-stop before .env.local write. HIGH (OpenAI #3): AC2/AC6 contract conflict between 'unchanged' action and 'missing_keys'. MEDIUM (OpenAI #5): keep phase=all global semantics intact via include_framework flag. MEDIUM (Gemini): missing_keys must be computed from final file state, not added subset. MEDIUM (OpenAI #4): export KEY= parsing. MEDIUM (OpenAI #6): drift-protection test against external_review_config.py order. MEDIUM (OpenAI #8): integration test for 'updated' path. MEDIUM (OpenAI #7): dedup policy first-occurrence-wins.
